homepage.title: Anna Gelderd MP | Labour MP for South East Cornwall
headings: h2: Anna Gelderd MP for South East Cornwall
h3: Working hard. Listening always. Fighting for our fair share.
homepage.text_excerpt: Anna Gelderd MP | Labour MP for South East Cornwall 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Anna Gelderd MP for South East Cornwall Working hard. Listening always. Fighting for our fair share. I’m honoured to have been elected as your MP and proud to serve the people of South East Cornwall. Rooted in our community, I’m relentless in championing the issues that matter most to you, whether that’s securing genuinely affordable housing, protecting our environment, standing up for local services or making sure South East Cornwall is never left behind. From Parliament to Polperro, I’m here to listen, to act, and to fight for a fairer share - building a greener, fairer and more prosperous future for us all. Learn More Learn More Contact Contact Surgeries Surgeries Westminster Westminster Latest News Latest News How I Voted How I Voted Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! pages.title: About | Learn More — Anna Gelderd MP
pages.meta_description: Learn about Anna Gelderd MP’s work for South East Cornwall, her community focus, and how she advocates for local issues like healthcare, housing, and coastal conservation.
headings: h2: Rooted in Cornwall. Driven by Community.
pages.text_excerpt: About | Learn More — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter I am proud to represent South East Cornwall, the place I call home, in Parliament. As your MP, I am working every day to be a strong, visible, and active voice for our community, championing the issues that matter most to local people. From improving healthcare and housing to protecting our coastlines and culture, I am committed to delivering real change and a fairer future for all of us. Passion, Purpose and Place. Before entering Parliament, I spent my career in the service of others, holding senior leadership roles in national and international charities, including the RNLI. I’ve represented the UK on the global stage, led national campaigns, and brought people together to solve complex problems with compassion and clarity. My background in economics, public policy and charity leadership means I bring practical experience, determination and strategic thinking to the challenges facing our region, whether that’s securing investment, fighting for affordable housing, or standing up for rural communities often overlooked by Westminster. Experience that delivers. Rooted in Cornwall. Driven by Community. I live on the Rame Peninsula and feel deeply connected to the land, the sea, and the communities that make this corner of Cornwall so special. I’m a committed conservationist, a sea swimmer year-round, and passionate about protecting the natural beauty that surrounds us. I believe our coastal heritage is something to be cherished, not only for what it means to our identity, but for the opportunities it holds for a greener, more sustainable future. When I am not in Parliament or out meeting residents across the constituency, you will often find me walking the coast path, swimming in the sea, or supporting local events and causes. This is not just where I work, it is my home, and I will always fight for it. Learn more Learn more My role first and foremost is to be a strong voice for local residents in Westminster and raise the issues that matter to you. In Parliament, I now serve as a Parliamentary Private Secretary (PPS) to the Ministers of the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero . In this role, I act as a bridge between ministers and MPs by listening, sharing feedback and helping to ensure that policies on energy and climate reflect the needs of communities like ours in South East Cornwall. I am also a member of several All-Party Parliamentary Groups (APPGs) on topics including Global Deforestation, Sustainable Finance, the UN Global Goals, Coastal Communities, Critical Minerals and Ageing and Older People. These roles allow me to work constructively across parties to promote practical solutions, highlight underrepresented issues and ensure that South East Cornwall has a strong voice in shaping our country’s future, particularly the transition to cleaner, greener energy. My Role in Parliament. Learn more Learn more Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! Anna Gelderd MP South East Cornwall Constituency House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 07783 636284 anna.gelderd.mp@parliament.uk © 2025 Anna Gelderd MP

pages.title: News — Anna Gelderd MP
pages.text_excerpt: News — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter My Work & Latest News Constituency News There is nothing more important to me than being out and about in our communities; listening, helping and working alongside people to make things better. This is where I share updates from across South East Cornwall: school visits, community events, local campaigns, and the small everyday wins that make a big difference. If there’s something going on near you, or a local issue you think I should know about, please do get in touch - I would love to hear from you. Learn More Parliamentary News London is a long way from Cornwall, but this is where I work to make sure our voice is heard. Whether I am speaking in debates, serving on the Environmental Audit Committee, or leading cross-party work on climate, finance and equality, I always have South East Cornwall in mind. This is the place where we can feel more connected between our community and Westminster - with updates on the issues I’m raising, the questions I’m asking, and the progress I’m pushing for on your behalf. Learn More Latest Hot Topics Every week, people across South East Cornwall get in touch about the issues that matter most to them — and I take that seriously. Whether it is transport problems, housing delays, access to healthcare, or rising costs, these messages help shape the work I do both locally and in Parliament. This section highlights some of the key concerns coming into the office right now. It is a snapshot of what people are experiencing — and a reminder that I am here, I am listening, and I am taking action wherever I can. Learn More Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! Anna Gelderd MP South East Cornwall Constituency House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 07783 636284 anna.gelderd.mp@parliament.uk © 2025 Anna Gelderd MP

pages.title: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Anna Gelderd MP
pages.meta_description: Contact Anna Gelderd MP for support, concerns, or inquiries about South East Cornwall. We
headings: h3: Need to Get in Touch?
h2: Wins for South East Cornwall
pages.text_excerpt: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Need to Get in Touch? Whether you need support with a personal issue, want to raise a concern, or just have something you’d like to share I would love to hear from you. My team and I are here to help constituents across South East Cornwall, and we aim to respond as quickly as we can. The reason I stood for election is because I want to help people and to make a real, positive difference to everyday lives. Often, it’s not the big headlines that matter most, but the quiet support or small changes that can really turn things around for someone. That’s what matters to me. To get the right help, please include: Your full name Full Address and Postcode (so we can confirm you're a constituent) A brief outline of your issue or enquiry There are some things MPs can help with and a few things we legally can’t . If you’re not sure, please check the FAQs page for a full guide on what support I can offer and visit Help & Resources to see where else you might be able to get help. If you’d like to book a surgery appointment, you can do that here. If your issue is urgent or sensitive, please mention that in your message. CASEWORK CHAMPION CASEWORK CHAMPION CASEWORK CHAMPION A big part of my job happens behind the scenes helping people across South East Cornwall with all sorts of problems: housing, benefits, healthcare, schools and more. Since being elected, I’ve helped thousands of residents resolve issues, get answers, and access the support they’re entitled to. Some of the most important wins are quiet ones — the kind that make a real difference to someone’s life but never make the headlines. From July 2024 to July 2025, I have received 17,528 emails on a huge range of topics, with 8,822 casework cases completed. Local topics that have really affected my constituents have been: Lack of NHS Dentists Bus route changes Threatened closure of Liskeard Post Office I have raised all these matters with the relevant ministers and received responses. There are now more than 7000 extra dental appointments offered, with local NHS dentists opening their appointment systems. Here’s a snapshot of what my team and I have been working on for you. Wins for South East Cornwall “ Thank you so much for all the work and time you have put in on my behalf. I really appreciate it and feel no longer powerless, thanks to you. If I may, I shall write to Mr Starmer to congratulate him on having such a caring MP who is genuinely concerned about her constituents. I know I was getting nowhere on my own and am so grateful to you. ” — Constituent of South East Cornwall. “ My team input has directly improved a number of Council Home Choice bandings, enabling constituents to bid for a house. ” “ My input has resulted in a family in unsuitable accommodation getting promptly rehoused. ” “ My office has stopped or paused several housing evictions, providing help and advice to ensure they stay in situ. ” “ My contact with DWP has turned around nonpayment of benefits,and have also managed to rectify long term errors with DWP and HMRC that had not been addressed. ” Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! Anna Gelderd MP South East Cornwall Constituency House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 07783 636284 anna.gelderd.mp@parliament.uk © 2025 Anna Gelderd MP

pages.title: Constituency Help & Resources | Get Help Today — Anna Gelderd MP
pages.meta_description: Explore constituency resources and support services including housing, health, safety, and more provided by MP Anna Gelderd for South East Cornwall constituents.
pages.text_excerpt: Constituency Help & Resources | Get Help Today — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Help & Advice If you live in South East Cornwall and are facing a problem, whether it’s with housing, healthcare, policing or something else, I may be able to help. Some issues fall within the responsibility of local councils or other services, but I will always do what I can to support you, signpost you to the right place, or raise your concerns where appropriate. Below you’ll find guidance and useful contacts for some of the most common areas people contact me about. Housing What Anna can help with: Delays or problems with housing associations Cases of serious disrepair or unsafe conditions Social housing allocation concerns Where else to turn: Cornwall Council Housing : Click here Shelter England : Click here or 0808 800 4444 Citizens Advice Cornwall : Click here Emergency housing? Contact Cornwall Council on 0300 1234 161 Children What Anna can help with: Supporting parents with concerns over school placements or SEND provision (if unresolved locally) Raising wider education policy concerns in Parliament Where else to turn: Your school’s headteacher or governor board Cornwall Council Education Services SENDIASS Cornwall (independent advice) Childline / NSPCC Health Services What Anna can help with: Raising concerns with NHS Trusts or ministers where there are repeated service failures Highlighting access issues with local providers Where else to turn: Your GP or local practice manager Cornwall & Isles of Scilly ICB (Integrated Care Board) PALS (Patient Advice and Liaison Service) or 01208 834620 NHS Complaints or 0300 311 22 33 Cornwall Council What Anna can help with: If you have exhausted Council channels and still need help, I may be able to raise issues with senior officials or highlight them publicly. What to do first: Report issues (bins, roads, planning) Contact your local Cornwall Councillor For complaints Policing & Crime What Anna can help with: Raising local concerns with Devon & Cornwall Police leadership Highlighting patterns of crime or antisocial behaviour at a strategic level Where else to turn: Report a crime : 101 or Contact us | Police.uk Crimestoppers (anonymous reports) Victim Support Citizens Advice If you're not sure where to turn, Citizens Advice Cornwall is a brilliant first port of call. They can help with: Debt and money issues Benefits, employment, and consumer rights Housing and family problems 📞 Call: Adviceline 0808 812 7156 Monday to Friday 10am to 4pm 🌐 Website: www.citizensadvicecornwall.org.uk 📍 Find your local office: 21 Dean Street, Liskeard PL14 4AB 0800 144 8848 Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! Anna Gelderd MP South East Cornwall Constituency House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 07783 636284 anna.gelderd.mp@parliament.uk © 2025 Anna Gelderd MP
